title: Knema pseudolaurina
taxonomy: Knema pseudolaurina belongs to the family Myristicaceae, a family of flowering plants commonly known as the nutmeg family. This classification places Knema pseudolaurina within the order Magnoliales and the class Magnoliopsida.
